Project Updates

  • New Website27 Mar 2026

Blog update · 27 Mar 2026

This is the new GEARUP-PD Website. We will be uploading and adding new information about project updates to this website.

The project is kicking off soon - applications have been completed for most of the coding instruments we will be using, as well as REDCap instruments created. We are waiting on meeting a few collaborators and community members. Ethics will be submitted soon within the coming week and hopefully we won't be too far off.

Signing off, Weber Liu

File source: New Website.md
